message:
chore(beads): track franken_numpy-n011 (expose r_ and c_ in fnp-python)

Flushes a single new in_progress issue to the JSONL ledger:

  franken_numpy-n011 — "Expose r_ and c_ in fnp-python" (task, P2)

NumPy's `np.r_` and `np.c_` index helpers (for row/column-wise array
construction) aren't yet surfaced through the fnp-python bindings; this
issue tracks that exposure work. No code change in this commit — just
`br sync --flush-only` output so the filesystem ledger stays in sync
with the SQLite DB used by other agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
